tests.scenario: Export saved mood history and journal records
steps: Log in to a user account that has saved mood history and journal records
tests.expected_result: The system generates an export file containing the user's saved mood history and journal records.

tests.scenario: Export option with no saved records
steps: Log in to a user account with no saved mood history or journal records
tests.expected_result: The system completes the export action and generates a file with no saved records or shows that no records are available to export.

tests.scenario: View data usage summary for one data category
tests.expected_result: The system displays the purpose of collection, whether the data is shared, and whether the data is stored in the user account for the selected data category.

tests.scenario: Switch between multiple data categories in privacy settings
tests.expected_result: The system updates the displayed data usage summary so that each selected data category shows its own purpose, sharing status, and storage status.

tests.scenario: Show error screen instead of blank page
steps: Attempt to open a page or result screen
Simulate a load failure for that page
tests.expected_result: The system displays an error screen with a retry button instead of showing a blank page.

tests.scenario: Retry loading after an error screen appears
steps: Attempt to open a page or result screen
Simulate a load failure so the error screen appears
tests.expected_result: The system makes a new loading attempt after the user selects retry.

tests.scenario: Restore unsaved questionnaire responses after app closes
steps: Start answering a questionnaire without submitting it
tests.expected_result: The system restores the unsaved questionnaire responses from the interrupted session.

tests.scenario: Restore partially completed questionnaire with multiple answers
steps: Answer multiple questionnaire items without submitting them
Reopen the app and return to the questionnaire
tests.expected_result: The system restores the previously entered unsaved questionnaire answers.

tests.scenario: Display Premium label on premium features
steps: Open a screen that lists app features
Locate one or more premium features
tests.expected_result: Every premium feature shown in the feature list displays a Premium label.

tests.scenario: Do not display Premium label on free features
steps: Open a screen that lists app features
Locate one or more free features
tests.expected_result: Free features in the feature list do not display a Premium label.

tests.scenario: Non-subscribed user views last 30 days of mood history
steps: Log in as a non-subscribed user with saved mood history entries
tests.expected_result: The system displays the last 30 days of entries with the date, mood rating, and saved note for each entry.

tests.scenario: Non-subscribed user with older history views mood history
steps: Log in as a non-subscribed user with mood history older than 30 days
tests.expected_result: The system displays only the entries from the last 30 days and does not require a subscription to view them.

tests.scenario: Submit usability feedback successfully
tests.expected_result: The system saves the feedback and displays a submission confirmation message.

tests.scenario: Submit content feedback successfully
steps: Select a feedback category for content
tests.expected_result: The system saves the content feedback and displays a submission confirmation message.

tests.scenario: Mark one question as not applicable
steps: Mark one question as not applicable
tests.expected_result: The system records that the selected question was marked as not applicable.

tests.scenario: Exclude a question marked not applicable from future sets
steps: Mark one question as not applicable
tests.expected_result: The question previously marked as not applicable is excluded from future question sets for that user.

tests.scenario: Send notification at saved reminder time
steps: Wait until the saved time is reached
tests.expected_result: The system sends a notification for a mood check-in at the saved reminder time.

tests.scenario: Update reminder time and send notification at new time
steps: Wait until the updated reminder time is reached
tests.expected_result: The system sends the mood check-in notification at the updated reminder time.

tests.scenario: Generate weekly mood summary after 7 days of entries
steps: Save mood entries on at least 7 different days
tests.expected_result: The system displays the average mood score for the period and the highest and lowest recorded mood values.

tests.scenario: Open weekly summary with more than 7 days of entries
steps: Save mood entries on more than 7 different days
tests.expected_result: The system displays a weekly mood summary generated from the saved mood entries for the relevant weekly period.
